rationale: The only linkage evidence is a single DOI match, and the citing-paper note does not explicitly connect its core mechanisms (false consensus, suppression, preference certainty, ironic monitoring) to the cited paper’s ordinal-vs-nominal social matching framework. Because there is some plausible topical overlap in managerial prediction of consumer behavior but no direct evidence of substantive use, this is not safe to drop yet not clearly a strong keep.
